titles.title: Kimi to Koete Koi ni Naru
Crossing the Walls of Love with You
キミと越えて恋になる
With You, Our Love Will Make It Through

data.title: Kimi to Koete Koi ni Naru
data.title_english: With You, Our Love Will Make It Through
data.title_japanese: キミと越えて恋になる
title_synonyms: Crossing the Walls of Love with You
data.synopsis:
When high schooler Mari bumps into a fellow tardy student, she's surprised to find out he's a beastfolk who's to attend her school! After all, it's not rare for beastfolk to coexist alongside humans, but it's still uncommon, with the prejudice and all. Nervous to meet one at first, Mari soon learns there's more to him than his furry exterior. In fact, the more she gets to know him, the more she finds herself drawn to him, his steadfastness, his kindheartedness, and... his body...

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Tianming Da Zhuzai
data.synopsis:
Since ancient times, Dahe Shenzhou has been a land where virtue and evil have been at odds. Numerous justice-related sects have banded together to combat the evil's twelve irresponsible sects. The justice Jinyi Sect's low-level supernatural power is Li Wannian, who possesses ordinary cultivation. He wants to live a life of peace and quiet, lying flat in the Jinyi Sect and receiving a salary.

He unexpectedly learned, however, that he possessed the eternal capacity to instantly resurrect at the point of life-or-death crisis while completing a task to deal with the transfer. More significantly, he can improve his cultivation after each resurrection by receiving incentives in the form of points based on his overall performance at the time of his beheading. To put it another way, Li Wannian has to make a valiant sacrifice, and in a way that inspires and motivates others if he hopes to advance his cultivation.

(Source: bilibili)

titles.title: Seikatsu wa Psychopath no Shi no You ni
生活はサイコパスの詩のように
Life Is the Poem by Psychopath

data.title: Seikatsu wa Psychopath no Shi no You ni
data.title_english: Life Is the Poem by Psychopath
data.title_japanese: 生活はサイコパスの詩のように
data.synopsis:
One rainy night, a man is murdered in a park and the protagonist witnesses it. He immediately calls the police, but his cell phone battery runs out. As he waits for the battery to recharge, his memory changes…

(Source: Ionian Contemporary Animation Festival)
data.background: Graduate Work 2024 by Yuansheng Yang, Tokyo Polytechnic University, Faculty of Arts, Department of Animation.

data.title: Shinitai Himawari
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Shinitai Himawari by Shinsei Kamattechan.

data.title: Xiang Huo Er Sheng
data.synopsis:
It mainly tells the moving story of Han Yan, the head of Feiliu Fire Station, and a group of young people including Jiang Mingsheng, Ning Wei, and Fan Haoyuan, who burn their youth and blood and fight on the front line of firefighting. Not only are there high-energy moments of fire rescue, but also the fire brigade that is extremely brave in wartime and extremely cute in leisure time, as well as fascinating suspense cases and hard-core firefighting knowledge! Show a different kind of passionate youth.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: ChaO
data.synopsis:
In a future society where humans and mermaids coexist, Stefan works as an office employee at a shipbuilding company. One day, he is suddenly proposed to by Chao, the princess of the mermaid kingdom. He ends up living with her, and becomes drawn to Chao's pure and honest love as time passes. What will become of their relationship?

(Source: Official YouTube, translated)

titles.title: カシスとアルルの物語
The Story of Cassis and Arles

data.title: Cassis to Arles no Monogatari
data.title_english: The Story of Cassis and Arles
data.title_japanese: カシスとアルルの物語
data.synopsis:
Cassis is the only daughter of a bakery in the small town of Fran. Her daily routine is to deliver freshly baked bread to the people of the town every morning. One day, a blonde young man named Arles comes to Cassis's shop. She is gradually drawn to him for his refreshing and gentle gaze. However, there is a reason why the young man has come to this town.

(Source: Official site, translated)

titles.title: Fushigi no Kuni de Alice to: Dive in Wonderland
不思議の国でアリスと -Dive in Wonderland-

data.title: Fushigi no Kuni de Alice to: Dive in Wonderland
data.title_japanese: 不思議の国でアリスと -Dive in Wonderland-
data.synopsis:
Rise Azumino is a university student who has lost in her life. One day, guided by an invitation letter left behind by her late grandmother, she enters "Wonderland." She meets a girl named Alice there and they travel together.

White Rabbit, Caterpillar, Queen of Hearts, Card Soldiers, Mad Hatter, March Hare, Humpty Dumpty, Tweedle Dum and Tweedle Dee who are twins, Cheshire Cat and... The residents of Wonderland appear before Rise one after another! And the crazy commotion that ensues!

What kind of future will Rise choose in this crazy adventure with Alice?

(Source: Official website, translated)
